title: Middle Eastern Style Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy lamb kebab recipe from the heart of Middle Eastern cuisine, perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder or leg, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Try to get a mix of lean and fat for juiciness

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. Cook the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
